title: デビュー戦の後に・狼煙を上げろ

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.
choice_data_list: That was great, Taishin! You must be tired.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not even. Hell, this isn't the time to be tired.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: This is just the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Come on, let's go.

Her cool demeanor never wavers, but I can tell
her stride is much more confident than it was
before the race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: So about my next race...
choice_data_list: You're thinking about the next race already?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You got a problem with that, or are you looking
to get kicked again?

I'm still stinging from the one she gave me before
the race, and I shake my head hurriedly.

If she were serious, I'm sure she could've put me in
the hospital, so I assume she must've been
holding back...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, about my next race... Or well, I guess
this is more about my future plans.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I want to take on the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If I'm gonna show up all my haters, I can't do just
any old race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
My only option is to win the Satsuki Sho, the
Japanese Derby, and the Kikuka Sho, where only
the best gather to battle it out.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll win 'em and make everyone eat their words.

However, the Satsuki Sho is still a ways off. It
would be best to enter her into some junior races
so she can gain more experience.
To that end...
choice_data_list:
How do you feel about running the Hopeful
Stakes first?

How do you feel about running the Hopeful
Stakes first?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Isn't that a junior G1 race?

Just like the Satsuki Sho, the Hopeful Stakes is a
2,000-meter race held at Nakayama Racecourse.

I tell her that it would be a good opportunity to
get a feel for what the real deal will be like.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Got it. Then let's do it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: And if I'm running it, then I'm winning it.

With that, we set our sights on the Hopeful
Stakes!
